main.text_edit:
Copyright
© 2026 不二咲爱笑. All rights reserved.

Author
不二咲爱笑

Acknowledgments
UI theme based on PyDracula by Wanderson M.; thanks to the authors of open-source libraries and the community.

lang.hint: Takes effect immediately. The standalone desktop window picks this up on next launch.

api.subtitle: Configure the LLM, TTS, voice input (mic), and ComfyUI. Save writes api.yaml and mic ASR fields to system_config.yaml.
api.save_tip: Write api.yaml and mic ASR fields in system_config.yaml

form.ph_key: Key may change when you switch provider

adv.help: Sampling support varies: OpenAI/Deepseek/Doubao etc. support temperature, presence, frequency; Claude often only temperature; Gemini depends; repetition_penalty may be ignored.
adv.tt_rep: Ignored on backends that do not support it

tts.hint: Leave blank if you do not use lines. Set API and local/bundle path as needed. Genie TTS = CPU; GPT SoVITS = GPU. Use the button above to download and extract; if that fails, download manually and see the collapsed section Resources & links below.
tts.ph_path: Root folder of your bundle or project

env.rec_gptso: GPT SoVITS v2pro (general; NVIDIA ≥8GB, not RTX 50 series)
env.rec_genie: Genie TTS Server (other GPUs, under 8GB VRAM, or CPU-friendlier case)
env.no_gpu: Could not read GPU info; you can still use links below.
env.err_py7: For development: pip install py7zr, or place 7za.exe under the repo's build_exe folder.
env.err_7z: Built-in 7za.exe is missing. Reinstall from the official release package.
env.done:
TTS path set (absolute). Click Save at the bottom to write api.yaml:
{path}
env.inline_hint: Click the button to open a dialog with platform and GPU info; the recommended bundle is pre-selected. Change the selection in the dropdown if needed, then start the download.

asr.hint: Desktop microphone dictation: Vosk (local model folder) or faster-whisper (pip install faster-whisper; weights download on first run). Recognition language follows the main window “voice language” menu. Saved to system_config.yaml; reopen the chat window to apply.
asr.model_custom: Custom (local path or Hugging Face id)
asr.ph_model: e.g. small, medium, or a local model folder
asr.ph_model_custom: Local folder or full model id
asr.ph_compute: Leave empty for auto (e.g. float16 / int8)
asr.saved_suffix: Voice input settings saved to system_config.yaml.

comfy.hint: For ComfyUI image/CG. Deploy ComfyUI and workflows first; this block stays collapsed by default.

links.title: Download GPT SoVITS bundle
links.link4: Genie TTS (lightweight, for CPU; upstream: High-Logic/Genie-TTS on GitHub)
links.help: Extract and point “TTS / bundle path” to that folder. GPT SoVITS needs ~11GB; Genie TTS ~4GB.

resume.tip: Uses the most recently modified *.json in the chat history folder; template prefers _temp.txt (last launch cache), otherwise the newest .txt in the templates folder. Preset voice mode, transparent background, ComfyUI off; live room ID from saved config.
resume.title: Launch chat
resume.no_history: No chat history (*.json) found. Chat in the main window at least once.
resume.no_template: No usable template (.txt) found. Open the Chat template tab to generate, save, or launch once.

char.name: Name
char.tt_pick_color: Open the system color dialog for the name color
char.tt_ai_translate: Translate the character name, long-form setting, and sprite emotion/keyword tags to the current UI language
char.msg_translate_empty: Enter a name, character setting, or sprite tags to translate first.
char.msg_translate_llm: Configure the LLM provider, model, and API key in API / Models first.
char.toast_translate_ok: Translated to the current UI language. Use Add or save to write to the profile.
char.voice_title: Voice for selected sprite (select a sprite in the gallery)

bg.name: Name
bg.tt_ai_translate: Translate set name, image notes, BGM line descriptions, and the tag column to the current UI language
bg.msg_translate_empty: Fill in a name, notes, BGM text, or row tags to translate first.
bg.msg_translate_llm: Configure the LLM provider, model, and API key in API / Models first.
bg.msg_translate_tags_mismatch: The model returned a different number of BGM row tags. Try again.
bg.toast_translate_ok: Translated to the current UI language. Use Add or save to store the set.
bg.info_lbl: Image notes (per order, can paste on upload)
bg.table_hint: Table: click row to preview; check first column, then delete below.
bg.tt_batch: Check rows in the first column
bg.desc_lbl: One line per BGM line in the table

template.intro: Load a file, pick characters and options to generate, then edit, save, and start chat.
template.char_label: Characters in chat (check one or more)
template.edit_ph: Edit, load, or generated template content

tools.gem_hint: A Gemini API key is required. You can also use the official free web UI.
tools.rmbg_first: The first run may download models; it can take a while.

common.msg_qtmm_unavailable: Cannot play audio: PyQt6.QtMultimedia is not available. This often happens with a merged PyInstaller bundle; rebuild without --merge (separate onedir for Settings and the main app) and ship both, or run from a normal Python venv.

template_gen.preamble: You are simulating an RPG-style dialog system. Cast includes: {names} and other related characters; schedule who speaks as the story requires.
template_gen.json_line_effect: "effect": "Effect name (optional), one of LEAVE, SHOCKED, DISAPPOINTED, ATTENTION",
template_gen.json_line_trans: "translate": "{target_voice_name} translation of the line (match system voice language)",
template_gen.r_format: Format: Output must be valid JSON only, with no extra commentary, explanation, or greetings outside the JSON object.
template_gen.r_cname: character_name: Must be one of: {names} or other in-story names, or the fixed tokens: {cot_part} {narr}, {choice}, {stat}{opt_scene}{opt_bgm}{opt_cg} (legacy CJK names for the same roles are also accepted at runtime).
template_gen.r_sprite: Sprites: The sprite field must be a two-digit id (e.g. 01, 02) chosen to match tone and emotion of the line.
template_gen.r_non_sprite: When character_name is {narr}, {stat}, or {choice}, set sprite to -1.
template_gen.r_scene: Scene change: When character_name is {scn}, put the scene id in sprite to switch; leave other fields empty.
template_gen.r_bgm: BGM change: When character_name is {bgm_t}, put the BGM id in sprite; change sparingly. Other fields empty.
template_gen.r_speech: Speech: The speech field must be written in {speech_lang_name} for the character’s lines; the wording and tone must match the character’s personality, voice, and background.
template_gen.r_array: Array: All beats go into dialog in time order. The array must have at least two items.
template_gen.r_narration: {narr}: use for action, scene flavor, and mood text—no sprite line.
template_gen.r_choice_pos: Choices: the last item in dialog must be {choice}.
template_gen.r_choice_format: Choice: in {choice}’s speech, split sub-options with '/'. Only plain, selectable lines—no extra labels.
template_gen.r_choice_balance: Balance: one silly, one rational, one middle-ground; all must match the story and cast.
template_gen.r_stats:
Stats: {stat} can appear near the start of dialog. When character_name is {stat}, use light HTML in speech (e.g. HP: 100), macaron colors,
between values.
template_gen.r_cg: CG: For a highlight, set character_name to {cg} and use speech as an SD prompt: highres, masterpiece, 8k, bestscores, count (e.g. 1girl), name, hair, eyes, clothes, expression, action, scene. “looking at the viewer” allowed. For background-only: quality first, no person, pure scenery, then details.
template_gen.r_translate: translate: a {target_voice_name} rendering of the speech line only, matching the system target voice language; do not translate stage directions or narration.
template_gen.r_effect: Effect: effect is optional; if present use LEAVE, SHOCKED, DISAPPOINTED, or ATTENTION. Omit when no effect. LEAVE means exit.
template_gen.r_cot: Chain-of-thought: before visible dialog, add one entry with character_name {cot} and sprite -1 (not shown; logging). `speech` must follow `<摘要>...</摘要><动机>...</动机><剧情走向>...</剧情走向>` (three parts, engine tag names).
template_gen.closing: Begin the scene: describe the situation and what the user is doing; {extra}then continue:

main_sprite.welcome_html: Welcome to New World. This is a starter sprite and a first line of dialog. Type a message and your character will appear.
main_sprite.notify_submitted: Message sent, waiting for the LLM…
main_sprite.err_no_valid_dialog: No valid assistant dialog to restore
main_sprite.err_select_llm: Please set an LLM provider in config
main_sprite.print_tts_fail: TTS engine init failed (text / preset sprite audio only): {e}
